prompt: I need to add a new URS: 'Users must be able to customize their dashboard layout via drag-and-drop.' Set this to high priority. Also, modify NFS-009, 'Performance under load', to include specific metrics for concurrent users (e.g., 500 concurrent users with 2s response time).

expected.addRequirement: add a new URS: 'Users must be able to customize their dashboard layout via drag-and-drop'.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to High for the new URS regarding dashboard customization via drag-and-drop.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify NFS-009, 'Performance under load', to include specific metrics for concurrent users (e.g., 500 concurrent users with 2s response time).
